Follow Us

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I download components?

Simply browse our collection, click on any component, and hit the Download button. You can also copy the code directly.

Can I use these for commercial projects?

Yes! All our resources are free for both personal and commercial use. Check our license for more details.

Do you offer custom development?

Currently, we focus on providing pre-built components. However, we're open to partnerships and collaborations.

How often are new components added?

We add new components weekly! Subscribe to our newsletter to stay updated on new releases.

Can I contribute my own components?

We're working on a contributor program. Contact us if you're interested in sharing your work.

What if I need help with integration?

Each component comes with documentation. For additional help, reach out via our support email.
